text.title: systemd User Services Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the service run ≥10 minutes OR continuously?

branch.question: Is loginctl enable-linger feasible for the operator?

text.example: FastAPI app under operator account, linger enabled → install fastapi.service + start.
